pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor to Design, Engineer, Supply, Install, Test, and Commission a Chiller-Based Air Dehumidification system.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Two (2) Water Cooled Chillers are required, each with a capacity of 300 TR.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller compressors must be of the Screw Compressor type.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller refrigerant must be R-134a, including the first charge.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Shell & Tube evaporator and condenser tubes must be made of SS 304.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be an Induced draft type with FRP Basin, Casing, and Louvers.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower circulation flow rate must be sufficient for a 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be designed for a Wet Bulb Temperature of 29 Deg. C and provide a cooling tower outlet temperature of 33 Deg. C.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Air Handling Unit (AHU) must have a Supply Air Fan Capacity of 53000 CFM.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must deliver an Outlet Air Temperature of 22 +/- 2 DegC and Relative Humidity of 45 +/- 2%.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU cooling coil, casing, tubes, and header must be made of SS 304. The drain pan must also be SS-304.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Three (3) Chilled Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby) and three (3) Condenser Water Pumps (2 Working + 1 Standby) are required.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pumps (Chilled and Condenser) must be suitable for a 600 TR refrigeration load, be centrifugal type, with Cast Iron casing, SS impeller, and EN8 shaft.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump motors must be IE-3, TEFC sq. cage induction, class F.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Water Cooled Screw Chiller are Kirloskar, Kehem’s, or Train.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Cooling Tower are Advance cooling towers, Paharpur, Encon, Thermal care, or M square.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Air Handling Unit (AHU) are Edgetech, Citizen, Zeco, or System Air.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Pumps are KSB, SULZER, KIRLOSKAR, WILO, WILFLEY, or GRUNDFOS.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Motors are CGL, BBL, Siemens, or ABB.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The project site location is Plot- K1, Taloja MIDC Road, MH 410208.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: The available electrical power supply at the site is 415 V / 50 Hz / 3 Ph. All equipment must be compatible.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must perform pre-commissioning tests including Hydrotest, Pneumatic test, and DOR check.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor must provide a separate cost for one year of Operation and Maintenance (O&M) services.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General
